$comment: Move/item constraints. `tagged` reads data/tags.json so 'setup', 'protect', 'speed_control' need no enumeration here. countDistinct over the speedControlKind facet captures 'multiple FORMS of speed control' (distinct mechanisms, not duplicate copies). Atoms: tagged, item, move. Assertions: count, countDistinct.
name: Moves and items

tests.title: At least 3 Protect-family users
tests.rationale: tagged(move, protect) covers Protect/Detect/Spiky Shield/Baneful Bunker/etc. without listing them here.

tests.title: At least one setup move on the team
tests.rationale: 'types of moves (setup) if a move exists on a team' — tagged(move, setup).

tests.title: At least 2 distinct forms of speed control
tests.rationale: countDistinct over facet:speedControlKind, filtered to speed-control moves — Tailwind + Trick Room counts as 2; two Tailwinds counts as 1.

tests.title: Someone knows Taunt
tests.rationale: Literal move constraint; `has` = knows this move.
